revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Chinese constellations | title = [[Chinese constellations]] | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | listclass = hlist | group1 = Three Enclosures (三垣) | list1 = * [[Purple Forbidden enclosure]] (紫微垣) * [[Supreme Palace enclosure]] (太微垣) * [[Heavenly Market enclosure]] (天市垣) | group2 = [[Four Symbols]] (四象) {{nobold|and}}
[[Twenty-Eight Mansions]] (二十八宿) | list2 = {{Navbox|child | evenodd = swap | list1 = ;East – [[Azure Dragon]] (青龍) : [[Horn (Chinese constellation)|Horn]] (角) : [[Neck (Chinese constellation)|Neck]] (亢) : [[Root (Chinese constellation)|Root]] (氐) : [[Room (Chinese constellation)|Room]] (房) : [[Heart (Chinese constellation)|Heart]] (心) : [[Tail (Chinese constellation)|Tail]] (尾) : [[Winnowing Basket (constellation)|Winnowing Basket]] (箕) | list2 = ;North – [[Black Tortoise]] (玄武) : [[Dipper (Chinese constellation)|Dipper]] (斗) : [[Ox (Chinese constellation)|Ox]] (牛) : [[Girl (Chinese constellation)|Girl]] (女) : [[Emptiness (Chinese constellation)|Emptiness]] (虛) : [[Roof (Chinese constellation)|Rooftop]] (危) : [[Encampment (Chinese constellation)|Encampment]] (室) : [[Wall (Chinese constellation)|Wall]] (壁) | list3 = ;West – [[White Tiger (mythology)|White Tiger]] (白虎) : [[Legs (Chinese constellation)|Legs]] (奎) : [[Bond (Chinese constellation)|Bond]] (婁) : [[Stomach (Chinese constellation)|Stomach]] (胃) : [[Hairy Head]] (昴) : [[Net (Chinese constellation)|Net]] (畢) : [[Turtle Beak]] (觜) : [[Three Stars (Chinese constellation)|Three Stars]] (參) | list4 = ;South – [[Vermilion Bird]] (朱雀) : [[Well (Chinese constellation)|Well]] (井) : [[Ghost (Chinese constellation)|Ghost]] (鬼) : [[Willow (Chinese constellation)|Willow]] (柳) : [[Star (Chinese constellation)|Star]] (星) : [[Extended Net]] (張) : [[Wings (Chinese constellation)|Wings]] (翼) : [[Chariot (Chinese constellation)|Chariot]] (軫) | list5 = ;Center – [[Yellow Dragon]] (黃龍) : [[Flat Earth#Ancient China|Earth]] }} }} {{Documentation|content= {{Collapsible option}} [[Category:China religion templates|constellations]] [[Category:Constellation navigational boxes|*‎]] }}

{{Navbox | name = Chinese constellations | title = [[Chinese constellations]] | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | listclass = hlist | group1 = Three Enclosures (三垣) | list1 = * [[Purple Forbidden enclosure]] (紫微垣) * [[Supreme Palace enclosure]] (太微垣) * [[Heavenly Market enclosure]] (天市垣) | group2 = [[Four Symbols]] (四象) {{nobold|and}}
[[Twenty-Eight Mansions]] (二十八宿) | list2 = {{Navbox|child | evenodd = swap | list1 = ;East – [[Azure Dragon]] (青龍) : [[Horn (Chinese constellation)|Horn]] (角) : [[Neck (Chinese constellation)|Neck]] (亢) : [[Root (Chinese constellation)|Root]] (氐) : [[Room (Chinese constellation)|Room]] (房) : [[Heart (Chinese constellation)|Heart]] (心) : [[Tail (Chinese constellation)|Tail]] (尾) : [[Winnowing Basket (constellation)|Winnowing Basket]] (箕) | list2 = ;North – [[Black Tortoise]] (玄武) : [[Dipper (Chinese constellation)|Dipper]] (斗) : [[Ox (Chinese constellation)|Ox]] (牛) : [[Girl (Chinese constellation)|Girl]] (女) : [[Emptiness (Chinese constellation)|Emptiness]] (虛) : [[Roof (Chinese constellation)|Rooftop]] (危) : [[Encampment (Chinese constellation)|Encampment]] (室) : [[Wall (Chinese constellation)|Wall]] (壁) | list3 = ;West – [[White Tiger (mythology)|White Tiger]] (白虎) : [[Legs (Chinese constellation)|Legs]] (奎) : [[Bond (Chinese constellation)|Bond]] (婁) : [[Stomach (Chinese constellation)|Stomach]] (胃) : [[Hairy Head]] (昴) : [[Net (Chinese constellation)|Net]] (畢) : [[Turtle Beak]] (觜) : [[Three Stars (Chinese constellation)|Three Stars]] (參) | list4 = ;South – [[Vermilion Bird]] (朱雀) : [[Well (Chinese constellation)|Well]] (井) : [[Ghost (Chinese constellation)|Ghost]] (鬼) : [[Willow (Chinese constellation)|Willow]] (柳) : [[Star (Chinese constellation)|Star]] (星) : [[Extended Net]] (張) : [[Wings (Chinese constellation)|Wings]] (翼) : [[Chariot (Chinese constellation)|Chariot]] (軫) | list5 = ;Center – [[Yellow Dragon]] (黃龍) : [[Flat Earth#Ancient China|Earth]] }} }} {{Documentation|content= {{Collapsible option}} [[Category:China religion templates|constellations]] [[Category:Constellation navigational boxes|*‎]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Chinese constellations | title = [[Chinese constellations]] | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | listclass = hlist | group1 = Three Enclosures (三垣) | list1 = * [[Purple Forbidden enclosure]] (紫微垣) * [[Supreme Palace enclosure]] (太微垣) * [[Heavenly Market enclosure]] (天市垣) | group2 = [[Four Symbols]] (四象) {{nobold|and}}
[[Twenty-Eight Mansions]] (二十八宿) | list2 = {{Navbox|child | evenodd = swap | list1 = ;East – [[Azure Dragon]] (青龍) : [[Horn (Chinese constellation)|Horn]] (角) : [[Neck (Chinese constellation)|Neck]] (亢) : [[Root (Chinese constellation)|Root]] (氐) : [[Room (Chinese constellation)|Room]] (房) : [[Heart (Chinese constellation)|Heart]] (心) : [[Tail (Chinese constellation)|Tail]] (尾) : [[Winnowing Basket (constellation)|Winnowing Basket]] (箕) | list2 = ;North – [[Black Tortoise]] (玄武) : [[Dipper (Chinese constellation)|Dipper]] (斗) : [[Ox (Chinese constellation)|Ox]] (牛) : [[Girl (Chinese constellation)|Girl]] (女) : [[Emptiness (Chinese constellation)|Emptiness]] (虛) : [[Roof (Chinese constellation)|Rooftop]] (危) : [[Encampment (Chinese constellation)|Encampment]] (室) : [[Wall (Chinese constellation)|Wall]] (壁) | list3 = ;West – [[White Tiger (mythology)|White Tiger]] (白虎) : [[Legs (Chinese constellation)|Legs]] (奎) : [[Bond (Chinese constellation)|Bond]] (婁) : [[Stomach (Chinese constellation)|Stomach]] (胃) : [[Hairy Head]] (昴) : [[Net (Chinese constellation)|Net]] (畢) : [[Turtle Beak]] (觜) : [[Three Stars (Chinese constellation)|Three Stars]] (參) | list4 = ;South – [[Vermilion Bird]] (朱雀) : [[Well (Chinese constellation)|Well]] (井) : [[Ghost (Chinese constellation)|Ghost]] (鬼) : [[Willow (Chinese constellation)|Willow]] (柳) : [[Star (Chinese constellation)|Star]] (星) : [[Extended Net]] (張) : [[Wings (Chinese constellation)|Wings]] (翼) : [[Chariot (Chinese constellation)|Chariot]] (軫) | list5 = ;Center – [[Yellow Dragon]] (黃龍) : [[Flat Earth#Ancient China|Earth]] }} }} {{Documentation|content= {{Collapsible option}} [[Category:China religion templates|constellations]] [[Category:Constellation navigational boxes|*‎]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Chinese constellations | title = [[Chinese constellations]] | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | listclass = hlist | group1 = Three Enclosures (三垣) | list1 = * [[Purple Forbidden enclosure]] (紫微垣) * [[Supreme Palace enclosure]] (太微垣) * [[Heavenly Market enclosure]] (天市垣) | group2 = [[Four Symbols]] (四象) {{nobold|and}}
[[Twenty-Eight Mansions]] (二十八宿) | list2 = {{Navbox|child | evenodd = swap | list1 = ;East – [[Azure Dragon]] (青龍) : [[Horn (Chinese constellation)|Horn]] (角) : [[Neck (Chinese constellation)|Neck]] (亢) : [[Root (Chinese constellation)|Root]] (氐) : [[Room (Chinese constellation)|Room]] (房) : [[Heart (Chinese constellation)|Heart]] (心) : [[Tail (Chinese constellation)|Tail]] (尾) : [[Winnowing Basket (constellation)|Winnowing Basket]] (箕) | list2 = ;North – [[Black Tortoise]] (玄武) : [[Dipper (Chinese constellation)|Dipper]] (斗) : [[Ox (Chinese constellation)|Ox]] (牛) : [[Girl (Chinese constellation)|Girl]] (女) : [[Emptiness (Chinese constellation)|Emptiness]] (虛) : [[Roof (Chinese constellation)|Rooftop]] (危) : [[Encampment (Chinese constellation)|Encampment]] (室) : [[Wall (Chinese constellation)|Wall]] (壁) | list3 = ;West – [[White Tiger (mythology)|White Tiger]] (白虎) : [[Legs (Chinese constellation)|Legs]] (奎) : [[Bond (Chinese constellation)|Bond]] (婁) : [[Stomach (Chinese constellation)|Stomach]] (胃) : [[Hairy Head]] (昴) : [[Net (Chinese constellation)|Net]] (畢) : [[Turtle Beak]] (觜) : [[Three Stars (Chinese constellation)|Three Stars]] (參) | list4 = ;South – [[Vermilion Bird]] (朱雀) : [[Well (Chinese constellation)|Well]] (井) : [[Ghost (Chinese constellation)|Ghost]] (鬼) : [[Willow (Chinese constellation)|Willow]] (柳) : [[Star (Chinese constellation)|Star]] (星) : [[Extended Net]] (張) : [[Wings (Chinese constellation)|Wings]] (翼) : [[Chariot (Chinese constellation)|Chariot]] (軫) | list5 = ;Center – [[Yellow Dragon]] (黃龍) : [[Flat Earth#Ancient China|Earth]] }} }} {{Documentation|content= {{Collapsible option}} [[Category:China religion templates|constellations]] [[Category:Constellation navigational boxes|*‎]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Chinese constellations | title = [[Chinese constellations]] | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | listclass = hlist | group1 = Three Enclosures (三垣) | list1 = * [[Purple Forbidden enclosure]] (紫微垣) * [[Supreme Palace enclosure]] (太微垣) * [[Heavenly Market enclosure]] (天市垣) | group2 = [[Four Symbols]] (四象) {{nobold|and}}
[[Twenty-Eight Mansions]] (二十八宿) | list2 = {{Navbox|child | evenodd = swap | list1 = ;East – [[Azure Dragon]] (青龍) : [[Horn (Chinese constellation)|Horn]] (角) : [[Neck (Chinese constellation)|Neck]] (亢) : [[Root (Chinese constellation)|Root]] (氐) : [[Room (Chinese constellation)|Room]] (房) : [[Heart (Chinese constellation)|Heart]] (心) : [[Tail (Chinese constellation)|Tail]] (尾) : [[Winnowing Basket (constellation)|Winnowing Basket]] (箕) | list2 = ;North – [[Black Tortoise]] (玄武) : [[Dipper (Chinese constellation)|Dipper]] (斗) : [[Ox (Chinese constellation)|Ox]] (牛) : [[Girl (Chinese constellation)|Girl]] (女) : [[Emptiness (Chinese constellation)|Emptiness]] (虛) : [[Roof (Chinese constellation)|Rooftop]] (危) : [[Encampment (Chinese constellation)|Encampment]] (室) : [[Wall (Chinese constellation)|Wall]] (壁) | list3 = ;West – [[White Tiger (mythology)|White Tiger]] (白虎) : [[Legs (Chinese constellation)|Legs]] (奎) : [[Bond (Chinese constellation)|Bond]] (婁) : [[Stomach (Chinese constellation)|Stomach]] (胃) : [[Hairy Head]] (昴) : [[Net (Chinese constellation)|Net]] (畢) : [[Turtle Beak]] (觜) : [[Three Stars (Chinese constellation)|Three Stars]] (參) | list4 = ;South – [[Vermilion Bird]] (朱雀) : [[Well (Chinese constellation)|Well]] (井) : [[Ghost (Chinese constellation)|Ghost]] (鬼) : [[Willow (Chinese constellation)|Willow]] (柳) : [[Star (Chinese constellation)|Star]] (星) : [[Extended Net]] (張) : [[Wings (Chinese constellation)|Wings]] (翼) : [[Chariot (Chinese constellation)|Chariot]] (軫) | list5 = ;Center – [[Yellow Dragon]] (黃龍) : [[Flat Earth#Ancient China|Earth]] }} }} {{Documentation|content= {{Collapsible option}} [[Category:China religion templates|constellations]] [[Category:Constellation navigational boxes|*‎]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Chinese constellations | title = [[Chinese constellations]] | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | listclass = hlist | group1 = Three Enclosures (三垣) | list1 = * [[Purple Forbidden enclosure]] (紫微垣) * [[Supreme Palace enclosure]] (太微垣) * [[Heavenly Market enclosure]] (天市垣) | group2 = [[Four Symbols]] (四象) {{nobold|and}}
[[Twenty-Eight Mansions]] (二十八宿) | list2 = {{Navbox|child | evenodd = swap | list1 = ;East – [[Azure Dragon]] (青龍) : [[Horn (Chinese constellation)|Horn]] (角) : [[Neck (Chinese constellation)|Neck]] (亢) : [[Root (Chinese constellation)|Root]] (氐) : [[Room (Chinese constellation)|Room]] (房) : [[Heart (Chinese constellation)|Heart]] (心) : [[Tail (Chinese constellation)|Tail]] (尾) : [[Winnowing Basket (constellation)|Winnowing Basket]] (箕) | list2 = ;North – [[Black Tortoise]] (玄武) : [[Dipper (Chinese constellation)|Dipper]] (斗) : [[Ox (Chinese constellation)|Ox]] (牛) : [[Girl (Chinese constellation)|Girl]] (女) : [[Emptiness (Chinese constellation)|Emptiness]] (虛) : [[Roof (Chinese constellation)|Rooftop]] (危) : [[Encampment (Chinese constellation)|Encampment]] (室) : [[Wall (Chinese constellation)|Wall]] (壁) | list3 = ;West – [[White Tiger (mythology)|White Tiger]] (白虎) : [[Legs (Chinese constellation)|Legs]] (奎) : [[Bond (Chinese constellation)|Bond]] (婁) : [[Stomach (Chinese constellation)|Stomach]] (胃) : [[Hairy Head]] (昴) : [[Net (Chinese constellation)|Net]] (畢) : [[Turtle Beak]] (觜) : [[Three Stars (Chinese constellation)|Three Stars]] (參) | list4 = ;South – [[Vermilion Bird]] (朱雀) : [[Well (Chinese constellation)|Well]] (井) : [[Ghost (Chinese constellation)|Ghost]] (鬼) : [[Willow (Chinese constellation)|Willow]] (柳) : [[Star (Chinese constellation)|Star]] (星) : [[Extended Net]] (張) : [[Wings (Chinese constellation)|Wings]] (翼) : [[Chariot (Chinese constellation)|Chariot]] (軫) | list5 = ;Center – [[Yellow Dragon]] (黃龍) : [[Flat Earth#Ancient China|Earth]] }} }} {{Documentation|content= {{Collapsible option}} [[Category:China religion templates|constellations]] [[Category:Constellation navigational boxes|*‎]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Chinese constellations | title = [[Chinese constellations]] | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | listclass = hlist | group1 = Three Enclosures (三垣) | list1 = * [[Purple Forbidden enclosure]] (紫微垣) * [[Supreme Palace enclosure]] (太微垣) * [[Heavenly Market enclosure]] (天市垣) | group2 = [[Four Symbols]] (四象) {{nobold|and}}
[[Twenty-Eight Mansions]] (二十八宿) | list2 = {{Navbox|child | evenodd = swap | list1 = ;East – [[Azure Dragon]] (青龍) : [[Horn (Chinese constellation)|Horn]] (角) : [[Neck (Chinese constellation)|Neck]] (亢) : [[Root (Chinese constellation)|Root]] (氐) : [[Room (Chinese constellation)|Room]] (房) : [[Heart (Chinese constellation)|Heart]] (心) : [[Tail (Chinese constellation)|Tail]] (尾) : [[Winnowing Basket (constellation)|Winnowing Basket]] (箕) | list2 = ;North – [[Black Tortoise]] (玄武) : [[Dipper (Chinese constellation)|Dipper]] (斗) : [[Ox (Chinese constellation)|Ox]] (牛) : [[Girl (Chinese constellation)|Girl]] (女) : [[Emptiness (Chinese constellation)|Emptiness]] (虛) : [[Roof (Chinese constellation)|Rooftop]] (危) : [[Encampment (Chinese constellation)|Encampment]] (室) : [[Wall (Chinese constellation)|Wall]] (壁) | list3 = ;West – [[White Tiger (mythology)|White Tiger]] (白虎) : [[Legs (Chinese constellation)|Legs]] (奎) : [[Bond (Chinese constellation)|Bond]] (婁) : [[Stomach (Chinese constellation)|Stomach]] (胃) : [[Hairy Head]] (昴) : [[Net (Chinese constellation)|Net]] (畢) : [[Turtle Beak]] (觜) : [[Three Stars (Chinese constellation)|Three Stars]] (參) | list4 = ;South – [[Vermilion Bird]] (朱雀) : [[Well (Chinese constellation)|Well]] (井) : [[Ghost (Chinese constellation)|Ghost]] (鬼) : [[Willow (Chinese constellation)|Willow]] (柳) : [[Star (Chinese constellation)|Star]] (星) : [[Extended Net]] (張) : [[Wings (Chinese constellation)|Wings]] (翼) : [[Chariot (Chinese constellation)|Chariot]] (軫) | list5 = ;Center – [[Yellow Dragon]] (黃龍) : [[Flat Earth#Ancient China|Earth]] }} }} {{Documentation|content= {{Collapsible option}} [[Category:China religion templates|constellations]] [[Category:Constellation navigational boxes|*‎]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Chinese constellations | title = [[Chinese constellations]] | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | listclass = hlist | group1 = Three Enclosures (三垣) | list1 = * [[Purple Forbidden enclosure]] (紫微垣) * [[Supreme Palace enclosure]] (太微垣) * [[Heavenly Market enclosure]] (天市垣) | group2 = [[Four Symbols]] (四象) {{nobold|and}}
[[Twenty-Eight Mansions]] (二十八宿) | list2 = {{Navbox|child | evenodd = swap | list1 = ;East – [[Azure Dragon]] (青龍) : [[Horn (Chinese constellation)|Horn]] (角) : [[Neck (Chinese constellation)|Neck]] (亢) : [[Root (Chinese constellation)|Root]] (氐) : [[Room (Chinese constellation)|Room]] (房) : [[Heart (Chinese constellation)|Heart]] (心) : [[Tail (Chinese constellation)|Tail]] (尾) : [[Winnowing Basket (constellation)|Winnowing Basket]] (箕) | list2 = ;North – [[Black Tortoise]] (玄武) : [[Dipper (Chinese constellation)|Dipper]] (斗) : [[Ox (Chinese constellation)|Ox]] (牛) : [[Girl (Chinese constellation)|Girl]] (女) : [[Emptiness (Chinese constellation)|Emptiness]] (虛) : [[Roof (Chinese constellation)|Rooftop]] (危) : [[Encampment (Chinese constellation)|Encampment]] (室) : [[Wall (Chinese constellation)|Wall]] (壁) | list3 = ;West – [[White Tiger (mythology)|White Tiger]] (白虎) : [[Legs (Chinese constellation)|Legs]] (奎) : [[Bond (Chinese constellation)|Bond]] (婁) : [[Stomach (Chinese constellation)|Stomach]] (胃) : [[Hairy Head]] (昴) : [[Net (Chinese constellation)|Net]] (畢) : [[Turtle Beak]] (觜) : [[Three Stars (Chinese constellation)|Three Stars]] (參) | list4 = ;South – [[Vermilion Bird]] (朱雀) : [[Well (Chinese constellation)|Well]] (井) : [[Ghost (Chinese constellation)|Ghost]] (鬼) : [[Willow (Chinese constellation)|Willow]] (柳) : [[Star (Chinese constellation)|Star]] (星) : [[Extended Net]] (張) : [[Wings (Chinese constellation)|Wings]] (翼) : [[Chariot (Chinese constellation)|Chariot]] (軫) | list5 = ;Center – [[Yellow Dragon]] (黃龍) : [[Flat Earth#Ancient China|Earth]] }} }} {{Documentation|content= {{Collapsible option}} [[Category:China religion templates|constellations]] [[Category:Constellation navigational boxes|*‎]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23128882600|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Chinese constellations | title = [[Chinese constellations]] | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | listclass = hlist | group1 = Three Enclosures (三垣) | list1 = * [[Purple Forbidden enclosure]] (紫微垣) * [[Supreme Palace enclosure]] (太微垣) * [[Heavenly Market enclosure]] (天市垣) | group2 = [[Four Symbols]] (四象) {{nobold|and}}
[[Twenty-Eight Mansions]] (二十八宿) | list2 = {{Navbox|child | evenodd = swap | list1 = ;East – [[Azure Dragon]] (青龍) : [[Horn (Chinese constellation)|Horn]] (角) : [[Neck (Chinese constellation)|Neck]] (亢) : [[Root (Chinese constellation)|Root]] (氐) : [[Room (Chinese constellation)|Room]] (房) : [[Heart (Chinese constellation)|Heart]] (心) : [[Tail (Chinese constellation)|Tail]] (尾) : [[Winnowing Basket (constellation)|Winnowing Basket]] (箕) | list2 = ;North – [[Black Tortoise]] (玄武) : [[Dipper (Chinese constellation)|Dipper]] (斗) : [[Ox (Chinese constellation)|Ox]] (牛) : [[Girl (Chinese constellation)|Girl]] (女) : [[Emptiness (Chinese constellation)|Emptiness]] (虛) : [[Roof (Chinese constellation)|Rooftop]] (危) : [[Encampment (Chinese constellation)|Encampment]] (室) : [[Wall (Chinese constellation)|Wall]] (壁) | list3 = ;West – [[White Tiger (mythology)|White Tiger]] (白虎) : [[Legs (Chinese constellation)|Legs]] (奎) : [[Bond (Chinese constellation)|Bond]] (婁) : [[Stomach (Chinese constellation)|Stomach]] (胃) : [[Hairy Head]] (昴) : [[Net (Chinese constellation)|Net]] (畢) : [[Turtle Beak]] (觜) : [[Three Stars (Chinese constellation)|Three Stars]] (參) | list4 = ;South – [[Vermilion Bird]] (朱雀) : [[Well (Chinese constellation)|Well]] (井) : [[Ghost (Chinese constellation)|Ghost]] (鬼) : [[Willow (Chinese constellation)|Willow]] (柳) : [[Star (Chinese constellation)|Star]] (星) : [[Extended Net]] (張) : [[Wings (Chinese constellation)|Wings]] (翼) : [[Chariot (Chinese constellation)|Chariot]] (軫) | list5 = ;Center – [[Yellow Dragon]] (黃龍) : [[Flat Earth#Ancient China|Earth]] }} }} {{Documentation|content= {{Collapsible option}} [[Category:China religion templates|constellations]] [[Category:Constellation navigational boxes|*‎]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{Navbox | name = Chinese constellations | title = [[Chinese constellations]] | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | listclass = hlist | group1 = Three Enclosures (三垣) | list1 = * [[Purple Forbidden enclosure]] (紫微垣) * [[Supreme Palace enclosure]] (太微垣) * [[Heavenly Market enclosure]] (天市垣) | group2 = [[Four Symbols]] (四象) {{nobold|and}}
[[Twenty-Eight Mansions]] (二十八宿) | list2 = {{Navbox|child | evenodd = swap | list1 = ;East – [[Azure Dragon]] (青龍) : [[Horn (Chinese constellation)|Horn]] (角) : [[Neck (Chinese constellation)|Neck]] (亢) : [[Root (Chinese constellation)|Root]] (氐) : [[Room (Chinese constellation)|Room]] (房) : [[Heart (Chinese constellation)|Heart]] (心) : [[Tail (Chinese constellation)|Tail]] (尾) : [[Winnowing Basket (constellation)|Winnowing Basket]] (箕) | list2 = ;North – [[Black Tortoise]] (玄武) : [[Dipper (Chinese constellation)|Dipper]] (斗) : [[Ox (Chinese constellation)|Ox]] (牛) : [[Girl (Chinese constellation)|Girl]] (女) : [[Emptiness (Chinese constellation)|Emptiness]] (虛) : [[Roof (Chinese constellation)|Rooftop]] (危) : [[Encampment (Chinese constellation)|Encampment]] (室) : [[Wall (Chinese constellation)|Wall]] (壁) | list3 = ;West – [[White Tiger (mythology)|White Tiger]] (白虎) : [[Legs (Chinese constellation)|Legs]] (奎) : [[Bond (Chinese constellation)|Bond]] (婁) : [[Stomach (Chinese constellation)|Stomach]] (胃) : [[Hairy Head]] (昴) : [[Net (Chinese constellation)|Net]] (畢) : [[Turtle Beak]] (觜) : [[Three Stars (Chinese constellation)|Three Stars]] (參) | list4 = ;South – [[Vermilion Bird]] (朱雀) : [[Well (Chinese constellation)|Well]] (井) : [[Ghost (Chinese constellation)|Ghost]] (鬼) : [[Willow (Chinese constellation)|Willow]] (柳) : [[Star (Chinese constellation)|Star]] (星) : [[Extended Net]] (張) : [[Wings (Chinese constellation)|Wings]] (翼) : [[Chariot (Chinese constellation)|Chariot]] (軫) | list5 = ;Center – [[Yellow Dragon]] (黃龍) : [[Flat Earth#Ancient China|Earth]] }} }} {{Documentation|content= {{Collapsible option}} [[Category:China religion templates|constellations]] [[Category:Constellation navigational boxes|*‎]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Chinese_constellations here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Chinese constellations | title = [[Chinese constellations]] | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | listclass = hlist | group1 = Three Enclosures (三垣) | list1 = * [[Purple Forbidden enclosure]] (紫微垣) * [[Supreme Palace enclosure]] (太微垣) * [[Heavenly Market enclosure]] (天市垣) | group2 = [[Four Symbols]] (四象) {{nobold|and}}
[[Twenty-Eight Mansions]] (二十八宿) | list2 = {{Navbox|child | evenodd = swap | list1 = ;East – [[Azure Dragon]] (青龍) : [[Horn (Chinese constellation)|Horn]] (角) : [[Neck (Chinese constellation)|Neck]] (亢) : [[Root (Chinese constellation)|Root]] (氐) : [[Room (Chinese constellation)|Room]] (房) : [[Heart (Chinese constellation)|Heart]] (心) : [[Tail (Chinese constellation)|Tail]] (尾) : [[Winnowing Basket (constellation)|Winnowing Basket]] (箕) | list2 = ;North – [[Black Tortoise]] (玄武) : [[Dipper (Chinese constellation)|Dipper]] (斗) : [[Ox (Chinese constellation)|Ox]] (牛) : [[Girl (Chinese constellation)|Girl]] (女) : [[Emptiness (Chinese constellation)|Emptiness]] (虛) : [[Roof (Chinese constellation)|Rooftop]] (危) : [[Encampment (Chinese constellation)|Encampment]] (室) : [[Wall (Chinese constellation)|Wall]] (壁) | list3 = ;West – [[White Tiger (mythology)|White Tiger]] (白虎) : [[Legs (Chinese constellation)|Legs]] (奎) : [[Bond (Chinese constellation)|Bond]] (婁) : [[Stomach (Chinese constellation)|Stomach]] (胃) : [[Hairy Head]] (昴) : [[Net (Chinese constellation)|Net]] (畢) : [[Turtle Beak]] (觜) : [[Three Stars (Chinese constellation)|Three Stars]] (參) | list4 = ;South – [[Vermilion Bird]] (朱雀) : [[Well (Chinese constellation)|Well]] (井) : [[Ghost (Chinese constellation)|Ghost]] (鬼) : [[Willow (Chinese constellation)|Willow]] (柳) : [[Star (Chinese constellation)|Star]] (星) : [[Extended Net]] (張) : [[Wings (Chinese constellation)|Wings]] (翼) : [[Chariot (Chinese constellation)|Chariot]] (軫) | list5 = ;Center – [[Yellow Dragon]] (黃龍) : [[Flat Earth#Ancient China|Earth]] }} }} {{Documentation|content= {{Collapsible option}} [[Category:China religion templates|constellations]] [[Category:Constellation navigational boxes|*‎]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
